mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_coupon (user_id, coupon_id, code, status, expired_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{couponId}, #{code}, #{status}, #{expiredAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_coupon WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY claimed_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_coupon WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND coupon_id = #{couponId}
mapper.update: UPDATE user_coupon SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT uc.* FROM user_coupon uc INNER JOIN coupon c ON uc.coupon_id = c.id WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} AND uc.status = 0 AND c.status = 1 AND uc.expired_at >= #{now} ORDER BY uc.expired_at ASC
